82 _34A SHWR_TRNSFR_ADMSN_CD (34a) Shower Transfer: Admission CHAR 2 A score indicating the patient's ability to get into and out of a shower at admission. 00 = Activity did not occur, 01 = Helper - Complete Dependence/Total Assistance
